subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath triumphed in My days, and hearkened unto My call, and witnessed that which the Tongue of My grandeur hath witnessed: that there is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بایامی و سمع ندائی و شهد بما شهد به لسان عظمتی انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proclamation to the people of the world, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution
